title: codereview: driver init and build issues
description: Uses DT_NODELABEL(keyboard0) instead of DT_INST macro for multi-instance safety. CONFIG_INPUT_INIT_PRIORITY may require select INPUT in Kconfig. No test added for Renode/hardware. No update to t_deck overlay or app to use the input. P1. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-zonh.3
